mnemonics.title: Smart Home Layers
mnemonics.content: SCPU - Sensing layer (sensors/actuators), Connectivity layer (Zigbee/WiFi), Processing hub (Raspberry Pi), User interface (mobile app)

mnemonics.title: SHARP Homes
mnemonics.content: SHARP - Secure, Handy, Automated, Remote-Controlled, Personalized - key features of smart home systems

mnemonics.title: Smart Home Protocols
mnemonics.content: ZWB - Zigbee (low power mesh), WiFi (high bandwidth), BLE (short range pairing) - choose based on power and bandwidth needs

mnemonics.title: IoT Lifecycle Stages
mnemonics.content: SCDA - Sense (detect event) -> Communicate (transmit data) -> Decide (process analytics) -> Act (trigger actuator)
